body.title: CLOSED: Gmail Page objects — InboxPage + ComposePage built to GmailFlow spec
body.result: InboxPage/ComposePage/MessageRef built to GmailFlow spec; profile guard added to load(); 25 tests green; commit 6956b990
body.description:
Follow-on to T-gmail-flow-layer (shipped 2026-05-03). The flow layer documented the Page interface in its docstring; this ticket builds the Page implementations.

**Pages required:**
- InboxPage with .load(), .open_compose(), .first_n_messages(n), .find_message(message_id)
- ComposePage with .set_to(addr), .set_subject(subject), .set_body(body), .send() -> message_id
- MessageRef return type with .id, .subject, .from_addr, .snippet, .archive(); .as_summary() helper for flow-side translation

**Pre-req:** SWADL custom-profile-support (shipped akienm/swadl@2347aa2) — must run in Akien's Igor browser profile via SELENIUM_USER_DATA_DIR.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/tools/swadl_pages/gmail_inbox.py (NEW), wild_igor/tools/swadl_pages/gmail_compose.py (NEW), wild_igor/tools/swadl_pages/gmail_message_ref.py (NEW). Tests: tests/test_swadl_pages_gmail_*.py.

**Pedagogy protocol (per parent epic T-igor-as-user-epic):** Igor proposes selectors, CC critiques (asks 'what happens if Google A/B tests this element?'), Igor revises. Reasoning deposited as ARCHITECTURE_DECISION memory nodes linked to PAGE_OBJECT + SELECTOR concept nodes.

**Test plan:** unit tests with mocked WebElements; integration test (separate ticket — gated on a throwaway test Gmail account being available).

**Provenance:** Akien 2026-05-03 workflow-first design ('flows-first, pages-last') — flow shipped first; pages get built last to a known spec.

**Pass condition:** Igor's browser profile opens gmail.com, navigates to inbox, and extracts sender + subject from the newest unread email — without CC involvement.
